papers.title: Representative Bureaucracy and Administrative Burdens: Exploring the Intersection of Lived Experience, Gender, and Professional Qualities
papers.abstract: Lived experience representative bureaucracy theory has expanded the scope of representative bureaucracy by exploring traits beyond race, ethnicity, and gender. However, scholars have yet to focus on the intersection of symbolic representation, intersectionality, and professional qualities. In this article, we employ lived experience representative bureaucracy theory and intersectionality theory to understand which identities (veteran status, gender, and disability status) and professional qualities shape client preferences on which bureaucrat they want to help them navigate administrative burdens. We analyze data from a conjoint experiment of 964 military veterans, showing that lived experience, intersectionality, and professional qualities matter, with the strongest preferences for employees who are responsive and competent. Regarding identity-based characteristics, veteran status and disability status representation were more salient than gender representation in helping veterans navigate healthcare-related administrative burdens. In line with our expectations grounded in intersectionality theory, we find that veterans with a disability prefer to be served by VA employees with a disability, demonstrating the importance of this combination of lived experiences and intersecting identities. We find further evidence that intersectionality matters among male respondents; the positive effects of veteran status were nullified in cases where the VA employee was transgender, revealing the importance of anti-transgender bias in shaping male veterans’ preferences. Exploratory analyses suggest that weak professional qualities can nullify or reverse the positive effects of shared identity, whereas strong professional qualities can compensate for the absence of representation. This study contributes to the literature by exploring the symbolic representative effects of various forms of lived experience representation alongside gender representation and professional qualities, as well as by examining representative bureaucracy through an intersectional lens. Additionally, our research provides a novel examination of disability status as an important and understudied identity with symbolic representative effects.
papers.journal: Journal of Public Administration Research and Theory
papers.abstract_zh: 生活經驗代表性官僚理論透過探討種族、族裔和性別以外的特徵，擴展了代表性官僚的範疇。然而，學者尚未關注象徵性代表、交織性與專業素質之間的交織。本文運用生活經驗代表性官僚理論和交織性理論，以理解哪些身份（退伍軍人身份、性別和身心障礙身份）和專業素質，會影響客戶對於希望由哪位官僚協助他們處理行政負擔的偏好。我們分析了來自964名退伍軍人的聯合實驗數據，結果顯示生活經驗、交織性和專業素質都很重要，其中對於反應迅速且有能力的員工有最強烈的偏好。在基於身份的特徵方面，退伍軍人身份和身心障礙身份的代表性，在協助退伍軍人處理與醫療保健相關的行政負擔時，比性別代表性更為顯著。與我們基於交織性理論的預期一致，我們發現身心障礙退伍軍人偏好由具有身心障礙身份的退伍軍人事務部（VA）員工服務，這顯示了生活經驗和交織身份這種組合的重要性。我們發現進一步的證據顯示，交織性在男性受訪者中也很重要；在VA員工為跨性別者的情況下，退伍軍人身份的正面影響被抵銷，這揭示了反跨性別偏見在形塑男性退伍軍人偏好方面的重要性。探索性分析顯示，較弱的專業素質可以抵銷或逆轉共享身份的正面影響，而強大的專業素質則可以彌補代表性的缺失。本研究透過探討各種形式的生活經驗代表性所產生的象徵性代表效果，以及性別代表性和專業素質，並透過交織性視角檢視代表性官僚，對文獻有所貢獻。此外，我們的研究提供了一個新穎的檢視，將身心障礙身份視為一個重要且未被充分研究、並具有象徵性代表效果的身份。

papers.title: AI street-level bureaucracy: deployment and preferences for public sector employment
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) is increasingly employed in street-level bureaucratic encounters, giving rise to AI street-level bureaucrats (AI SLBs). Yet how specific attributes of working alongside AI SLBs shape preferences for public sector employment remains poorly understood. We conducted a discrete choice experiment (n = 1,320 observations) and follow-up interviews (n = 40) with final-year master’s students in Hong Kong to examine tradeoffs among five AI SLB deployment attributes: AI SLBs’ deployment intensity, performance, decision-making autonomy, workplace AI training, and AI skills development subsidies. Results reveal that participants prefer public sector jobs featuring lower AI SLBs’ decision-making autonomy, AI performance equivalent to humans, provision of AI-related training, and higher subsidies for AI skills development. Deployment intensity was not a significant predictor. This study advances the literature on public sector employment preferences in the AI era by identifying which attributes of human-AI collaboration matter most to prospective workers. Given that the findings from this strategically selected group may not generalize to all public sector seekers, we advocate for further research examining a broader range of stakeholders involved in public sector employment.
papers.abstract_zh: 人工智慧 (AI) 越來越多地被運用於第一線官僚互動中，催生了人工智慧第一線官僚 (AI SLBs)。然而，與AI第一線官僚協同工作的特定屬性如何影響對公共部門職位的偏好，仍了解甚少。我們對香港的碩士班應屆畢業生進行了一項離散選擇實驗 (n = 1,320 個觀察值) 和後續訪談 (n = 40 位)，旨在檢視五項AI第一線官僚部署屬性之間的權衡：AI第一線官僚的部署強度、績效、決策自主性、職場AI培訓以及AI技能發展補助。結果顯示，參與者偏好具有較低AI第一線官僚決策自主性、AI績效與人類相當、提供AI相關培訓以及較高AI技能發展補助的公共部門職位。部署強度並非顯著的預測因子。本研究透過識別哪些人機協作屬性對潛在工作者最為重要，推進了AI時代公共部門就業偏好相關的文獻。鑑於來自這個策略性選取群體的發現可能無法推論至所有公共部門求職者，我們呼籲進一步研究，檢視更廣泛涉及公共部門就業的利害關係人。

papers.title: AI Public Value Creation: Data Encoding, Aggregation, and Algorithmic Computation
papers.abstract: AI systems in public administration challenge the premise that value creation arises from managers' strategic mediation among the vertices of Moore's strategic triangle: Public value, legitimacy, and operational capacity. AI imposes new logics that reshape vertices and their interaction dynamics. Critically, these transformations become entrenched through what we term algorithmic public value lock‐in: the crystallization of contingent value definitions into durable technical infrastructures resistant to democratic revision. Examining Peru's SISFOH, an algorithmic welfare‐targeting system, we reveal three interconnected shifts: data management recasts legitimacy as computational objectivity; standardized classifications redefine public value in narrow, quantifiable terms; and algorithmic processing transforms operational capacity from adaptive discretion to rigid execution. Together, these shifts produce lock‐in effects that potentially insulate public value creation from political negotiation.
papers.abstract_zh: 公共行政領域中的AI系統挑戰了以下前提：價值創造源於管理者在摩爾策略三角（公共價值、正當性與運作能力）各個頂點之間的策略性中介。AI帶來了新的邏輯，重塑了這些頂點及其互動動態。關鍵的是，這些轉變透過我們稱之為「演算法公共價值鎖定」的現象而根深蒂固：偶發性價值定義結晶化為持久的技術基礎設施，難以透過民主程序修正。透過檢視秘魯的SISFOH（一個演算法福利目標鎖定系統），我們揭示了三個相互關聯的轉變：資料管理將正當性重新定義為計算客觀性；標準化分類以狹隘、可量化的方式重新定義公共價值；演算法處理將運作能力從適應性裁量轉變為僵硬的執行。總體而言，這些轉變產生了鎖定效應，可能使公共價值創造與政治協商隔絕。

papers.title: Civil Servants’ Awareness of Government Performance on the SDGs: The Role of Public Service Motivation and Organizational Commitment
papers.abstract: One of the major barriers to the national government achieving the sustainable development goals (SDGs) is civil servants’ lack of awareness of the SDGs’ importance and of a clear understanding of how to link between their organizational goals and the SDGs. In this article, we examine to what extent civil servants are aware of SDGs-implementation performance by illuminating the role of their public service motivation (PSM) and organizational commitment. We hypothesize that civil servants with higher PSM and organizational commitment will be better aware of SDGs implementation performance, showing a smaller gap between the actual performance in accomplishing the SDGs and their perception of it. Leveraging the original data from surveys with 2,161 civil servants in South Korea combined with the performance data from the UN Sustainable Development Solutions Network (SDSN), our analysis strongly supports our predictions. An increase from the observed median to maximum values of PSM and organizational commitment, respectively, leads to 1.43- and 1.5-times greater awareness of SDGs-implementation performance among civil servants. Our findings have important implications: strengthening PSM and organizational commitment can play a central role in increasing civil servants’ awareness of SDGs-implementation performance and ultimately facilitating the achievement of the SDGs.
papers.abstract_zh: 國家政府實現永續發展目標（SDGs）的主要障礙之一，是公務人員對SDGs重要性缺乏認知，以及對如何將其組織目標與SDGs連結缺乏清晰理解。本文探討公務人員對SDGs執行績效的認知程度，藉由闡明其公共服務動機（PSM）和組織承諾所扮演的角色。我們假設，具有較高公共服務動機和組織承諾的公務人員，將能更清楚地認知SDGs執行績效，顯示在實現SDGs的實際績效與其認知之間存在較小的差距。本研究利用對韓國2,161名公務人員進行調查的原始數據，並結合聯合國永續發展解決方案網絡（SDSN）的績效數據，我們的分析結果強烈支持了我們的預測。當公共服務動機和組織承諾分別從觀察到的中位數增加到最大值時，公務人員對SDGs執行績效的認知程度分別提高1.43倍和1.5倍。我們的研究結果具有重要啟示：強化公共服務動機和組織承諾，可以在提高公務人員對SDGs執行績效的認知，並最終促進SDGs的實現方面，發揮核心作用。

papers.title: The impact of public agency representation on citizen perception in the face of technological discrimination
papers.abstract: This study explores how public agency representation and expertise shape citizen perceptions of algorithmic discrimination. Using theories of representative bureaucracy and Human-In-The-Loop (HITL), an experimental design with a general population and an African American sample examines how algorithmic correction approaches influence trust, legitimacy, and perceived performance. Expert involvement increases positive perceptions across samples, with stronger effects observed in the African American sample. Awareness of inclusion boosts trust among the African American sample but has mixed results for the general population. Findings suggest that while technical expertise is crucial, representative inclusion is vital for rebuilding trust within communities historically impacted by discrimination.
papers.abstract_zh: 本研究探討公部門代表性與專業知識如何形塑公民對演算法歧視的觀感。本研究運用代表性官僚體制與人機協作 (HITL) 理論，透過針對一般民眾與非裔美國人樣本的實驗設計，檢視演算法修正方法如何影響信任、正當性與感知績效。專家參與提升了各樣本的正面觀感，且在非裔美國人樣本中觀察到更強烈的效果。對於納入的意識提升了非裔美國人樣本的信任，但對一般民眾則產生了混合的結果。研究結果顯示，儘管技術專業知識至關重要，代表性納入對於在歷史上受歧視影響的社群中重建信任仍不可或缺。

papers.title: Which Type of AI ‐Based Public Services Are Citizens More Willing to Accept?
papers.abstract: While AI is reshaping public services, the acceptance of diverse AI‐based public service innovations by citizens has not been fully examined. This study conducted a video‐based experiment involving 2254 citizens and four types of AI: mechanical, empathetic, analytical, and intuitive. The results show that mechanical AI was significantly more accepted by citizens, whereas empathetic AI was significantly less accepted. Acceptance of the other two types of AI was moderate, with no significant differences found between them. AI types affected acceptance through two paths: perceived usefulness and novelty. The mediating effect of AI's perceived usefulness was found to be stronger than its novelty. Furthermore, citizens' trust in the government positively moderated the impact of the perceived novelty of AI. Thus, we recommend that governments adopt a gradual promotion strategy when introducing AI‐based public services.
papers.abstract_zh: 儘管人工智慧正在重塑公共服務，公民對多元人工智慧公共服務創新之接受度尚未獲得充分探討。本研究採用一項影片式實驗，涉及2254位公民與四種人工智慧類型：機械型、同理型、分析型和直覺型。研究結果顯示，機械型人工智慧顯著獲得公民較高接受度，而同理型人工智慧則顯著獲得較低接受度。其他兩種人工智慧類型的接受度為中等，且兩者之間未發現顯著差異。人工智慧類型透過兩種途徑影響接受度：感知有用性與新穎性。人工智慧感知有用性的中介效果被發現比其新穎性更強。此外，公民對政府的信任正向調節了人工智慧感知新穎性的影響。因此，本研究建議政府在推動人工智慧公共服務時，應採取漸進式推廣策略。

papers.title: Negativity trumps source: exploring the perceptions of AI-advice among public officials
papers.abstract: The advancement of artificial intelligence (AI) may renew our understanding of evidence-based policymaking. Grounded in motivated reasoning and negativity bias literature, this study adopts a 2 × 2 survey experiment to explore how advice source and valence affect public officials’ trust and policy preference. Findings demonstrate that advice containing negative result exerts disproportionate influence. Moreover, when advice aligns with public officials’ prior policy beliefs, negativity bias amplifies their preference. These findings highlight how cognitive biases impede the public officials’ interpretation to policy advice.
papers.abstract_zh: 人工智慧 (AI) 的進展可能會更新我們對實證政策制定的理解。本研究立基於動機性推理與負面偏誤文獻，採用 2 × 2 調查實驗，旨在探討建議來源與效價如何影響公務員的信任與政策偏好。研究結果顯示，包含負面結果的建議會產生不成比例的影響。此外，當建議與公務員先前的政策信念一致時，負面偏誤會放大他們的偏好。這些研究結果突顯了認知偏誤如何阻礙公務員對政策建議的解讀。

papers.title: When boards look like women: gender representation and women’s services in China’s social work organizations
papers.abstract: Whether board gender composition translates into substantive service actions is an important question for representative bureaucracy theory in non-profit governance. Drawing on this theory, this study uses a sequential explanatory mixed-methods design to examine the association between the female board ratio and whether social work organizations offer women’s services. A higher female board ratio is associated with a greater likelihood of offering women’s services, and this association strengthens as the organization’s relationship with the All-China Women’s Federation deepens. Qualitative analysis identifies organizational culture as the key mechanism. The study clarifies the conditions and mechanisms through which representation produces substantive outcomes.
papers.abstract_zh: 董事會性別組成是否能轉化為實質服務行動，是非營利治理中代表性官僚理論的一個重要問題。本研究援引此理論，採用序列解釋性混合方法設計，以檢視董事會女性比例與社會工作組織是否提供女性服務之間的關聯。結果顯示，較高的董事會女性比例與提供女性服務的較高可能性相關，且此關聯性會隨著組織與中華全國婦女聯合會的關係深化而增強。質性分析指出組織文化是其關鍵機制。本研究闡明了代表性產生實質成果的條件與機制。

papers.title: Pathways to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion: The Role of Organizational Learning in Enhancing Racial Minority Leadership
papers.abstract: Diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) initiatives often struggle to achieve lasting impact. This study explores how organizational learning through policy tourism influences inclusive business development and workforce diversity across U.S. cities. Using an exploratory sequential mixed-methods research design, this study first employs qualitative content analysis to classify DEI learning into four types based on learning depth and focus. It then applies a ridge-augmented synthetic control method to examine their distinct effects on racial minority representation in city business leadership. This study advances understanding of organizational learning theoretically and analytically. It also provides practical insights for promoting inclusive economic growth.
papers.abstract_zh: 多元、公平與共融 (DEI) 倡議往往難以產生持久影響。本研究探討組織學習如何透過政策觀光，影響美國各城市的共融性商業發展與勞動力多元性。本研究採用探索性序列混合方法研究設計，首先運用質性內容分析，根據學習深度與焦點將DEI學習分為四種類型。接著應用嶺迴歸增強型合成控制法，檢視其對城市商業領導階層中種族少數群體代表性的獨特影響。本研究在理論上與分析上增進了對組織學習的理解。本研究亦為促進共融性經濟成長提供實務見解。

papers.title: Political Upheaval and Bureaucratic Behavior: Quasi-Experimental Evidence for Public Sector HRM
papers.abstract: This study employs a quasi-experimental pre–post research design, exploiting a political uprising in Bangladesh as an exogenous shock to examine its effects on the organizational behaviors of public servants. Drawing on a unique pre- and post-uprising survey, the study categorizes bureaucratic behaviors into situational and dispositional responses. The findings show that political instability primarily disrupts context-dependent organizational dynamics (situational), while core individual values (dispositional) remain comparatively stable. Situational behaviors, such as job satisfaction and inter-service relationships, decline significantly following the regime change due to heightened uncertainty, role ambiguity, and job insecurity. In contrast, dispositional behaviors, such as Public Service Motivation (PSM) and Organizational Citizenship Behavior (OCB), remain resilient, suggesting that deeply internalized values are less vulnerable to political disruptions. By distinguishing between situational and dispositional behaviors, the study contributes to understanding bureaucratic resilience during political crises and offers practical implications for public-sector human resource management following political upheaval.
papers.abstract_zh: 本研究採用準實驗性前測後測研究設計，利用孟加拉國的政治起義作為外生衝擊，以檢視其對公務人員組織行為的影響。本研究根據一份獨特的前起義與後起義調查，將官僚行為歸類為情境性與傾向性反應。研究結果顯示，政治不穩定主要擾亂依賴情境的組織動態（情境性），而核心個人價值觀（傾向性）則相對穩定。情境性行為，例如工作滿意度與跨部門關係，在政權更迭後顯著下降，原因是不確定性增加、角色模糊以及工作不安全感。相較之下，傾向性行為，例如公共服務動機（PSM）與組織公民行為（OCB），仍保持韌性，這表明根深蒂固的內化價值觀較不易受政治動盪影響。透過區分情境性與傾向性行為，本研究有助於理解政治危機期間的官僚韌性，並為政治動盪後的公共部門人力資源管理提供實務意涵。

papers.title: Mapping the temporal evolution of causal effects in public administration and policy research
papers.abstract: Recent growth in the use of randomized and quasi-experiments in public administration and policy research has advanced the ability to establish cause-and-effect relationships. However, many studies adopt static conceptions of causality, focusing on snapshots or time-averaged effects while overlooking how the effects change over time. This oversight is problematic, as interventions of scholarly interest, such as leadership training or the adoption of new technologies, are likely to produce impacts that unfold in various ways. In this paper, we propose a conceptual framework for understanding the temporal dynamics of causal effects and their implications for research hypotheses and design. We then introduce Bayesian changepoint models (BCMs) as a methodological tool for detecting shifts in the average, variance, or trend of causal effect series, providing a more rigorous yet accessible alternative to visually inspecting graphs. Next, we demonstrate the application of BCMs with an illustrative example derived from simulation data as well as a real-world case examining the effect of body-worn cameras on police officers’ use of force. Finally, we discuss how examining temporal changes in effects can advance theoretical understanding of why and how they occur, as well as inform the design and implementation of policies and strategies in practice.
papers.journal: Journal of Public Administration Research and Theory
papers.abstract_zh: 近年來，隨機對照實驗與準實驗在公共行政與政策研究中的應用日益增長，提升了建立因果關係的能力。然而，許多研究採用靜態的因果觀念，側重於單一時間點的觀察或時間平均效應，卻忽略了效應如何隨時間變化。這種疏漏會導致問題，因為學術上感興趣的干預措施，例如領導力培訓或新科技的採用，其影響很可能以多種方式呈現。在本文中，我們提出一個概念性框架，用於理解因果效應的時間動態及其對研究假設與設計的意涵。接著，我們引入貝氏變點模型 (BCMs) 作為一種方法學工具，用於偵測因果效應序列的平均值、變異數或趨勢的變化，提供了一種比目視檢查圖表更嚴謹且易於操作的替代方案。隨後，我們透過一個來自模擬數據的說明性範例，以及一個探討密錄器對警察使用武力影響的真實案例，展示了 BCMs 的應用。最後，我們討論了檢視效應的時間變化如何能夠增進對其發生原因和方式的理論理解，並為實務中政策與策略的設計及實施提供參考。

papers.title: The power of compassion-seeking: how enforcement officers’ discursive strategies foster citizens’ cooperative responses under policy ambiguity
papers.abstract: Street-level bureaucrats (SLBs) often employ compassion-seeking strategies when interacting with citizens under ambiguous policy conditions. However, citizens’ responses to these strategies remain largely unexplored. This study thus examines whether SLBs’ compassion-seeking strategies promote inspectees’ cooperative responses under policy ambiguity. We conducted survey experiments using four real-world enforcement scenarios across emergency and routine regulatory contexts in China. The results show that SLBs’ compassion-seeking strategies significantly increase inspectees’ willingness to comply, acceptance of enforcement, emotional compassion toward SLBs, and supportive intentions. Furthermore, the effectiveness of compassion-seeking is stronger in emergency contexts than in routine regulatory contexts. The findings indicate that compassion-seeking is a context-sensitive and underappreciated mechanism through which SLBs can reduce antagonism, establish constructive relationships, and enhance both the efficacy and perceived legitimacy of frontline enforcement.
papers.journal: Journal of Public Administration Research and Theory
papers.abstract_zh: 街頭官僚（SLBs）在政策模糊不清的情況下與民眾互動時，經常運用尋求同情策略。然而，民眾對這些策略的回應仍鮮少被探討。本研究因此探討，在政策模糊不清的情況下，街頭官僚的尋求同情策略是否能促進受檢者的合作回應。我們在中國進行了問卷實驗，採用四個橫跨緊急與常規監管情境的真實世界執法情境。結果顯示，街頭官僚的尋求同情策略顯著提升了受檢者的配合意願、對執法的接受度、對街頭官僚的情感同情，以及支持意圖。此外，尋求同情策略的成效在緊急情境中比在常規監管情境中更為顯著。這些發現指出，尋求同情是一種情境敏感且未受充分重視的機制，街頭官僚可藉此減少對立、建立建設性關係，並提升第一線執法的效能與感知合法性。

papers.title: A Replication of “Emotional Responses to Bureaucratic Red Tape”
papers.abstract: Why does bureaucracy often sting the public, evoking negative sentiment even when its rules are well‐designed? This study addresses this paradox through a laboratory experiment in the Chinese context ( N = 280), replicating and extending a seminal study by Hattke et al. (2020) on emotional responses to red tape. Employing physiological measures, including facial expression analysis and electrodermal activity, we examined the effects of red tape, rule functionality, and, as a key theoretical extension, rule transparency on public emotions within a simulated government subsidy application scenario. The findings confirm that red tape, particularly administrative burden, is a robust antecedent of negative emotions. More critically, the study reveals the profound limitations of informational strategies: neither explaining a rule's function nor enhancing its transparency could soothe negative emotions, let alone elicit positive ones. This research contributes by demonstrating, through cross‐cultural validation and theoretical extension, that in citizen‐state interactions, the experiential costs of a procedure often override its cognitive rationality. This insight offers a crucial directive for public service design: governments should prioritize minimizing experiential costs through process simplification, while strategically leveraging transparency to manage negative expectations and compensating for the inherent emotional deficits of bureaucracy by enhancing interactional quality.
papers.abstract_zh: 官僚體制為何常讓民眾感到不悅，即使其規則設計良好，仍引發負面觀感？本研究透過在華人社會情境（N = 280）進行實驗室實驗，旨在探討此一悖論，並複製與延伸 Hattke 等人 (2020) 關於民眾對繁文縟節情緒反應的開創性研究。本研究採用生理測量方法，包括臉部表情分析和皮膚電反應，檢視繁文縟節、規則功能性，以及作為一項重要理論延伸的規則透明度，在模擬政府補助申請情境中對民眾情緒的影響。研究結果證實，繁文縟節，尤其是行政負擔，是負面情緒的穩健前因。更關鍵的是，本研究揭示了資訊策略的深遠局限性：無論是解釋規則功能，還是提升其透明度，都無法緩解負面情緒，更遑論引發正面情緒。本研究透過跨文化驗證和理論延伸，證明在公民與國家互動中，程序所帶來的體驗成本往往超越其認知理性，為學術界做出貢獻。這一洞見為公共服務設計提供了關鍵指導：政府應優先透過流程簡化來最小化體驗成本，同時策略性地運用透明度以管理負面預期，並藉由提升互動品質來彌補官僚體制固有的情感缺陷。

papers.title: Unraveling Bureaucratic Procrastination: Probabilistically Sufficient Factors and Necessary Conditions
papers.abstract: When confronted with demanding workloads and limited resources, grassroots bureaucrats may resort to procrastinating on tasks as a coping strategy. This study integrates the Stimulus‐Organism‐Response (SOR) model, the Social Cognitive Theory (SCT), and the Conservation of Resources (COR) theory to unravel the multi‐layered drivers of bureaucratic procrastination. Using survey data from Chinese grassroots bureaucrats, we employed a dual‐logic approach that incorporated the perspectives of both sufficiency and necessity. The results, visualized through Bottleneck Importance‐Performance Map Analysis (BIPMA), reveal a hierarchy for interventions. Organizational identification emerges as the highest priority, functioning as both a potent sufficient factor and a critical necessary condition. Self‐efficacy serves as a moderate obstacle for specific subgroups who require targeted support, while public service motivation acts as a foundational prerequisite that warrants ongoing maintenance rather than active enhancement. Combined with strategies to mitigate emotional exhaustion, these insights can facilitate a more targeted allocation of resources to curtail bureaucratic procrastination. This research advances the study of bureaucratic behavior by providing actionable guidance to mitigate bureaucratic procrastination and also by offering a methodological contribution through the application of dual‐logic analysis to complex organizational phenomena.
papers.abstract_zh: 當面臨繁重的工作量和有限的資源時，基層官僚可能會訴諸於任務拖延作為一種因應策略。本研究整合了刺激-個體-反應 (SOR) 模型、社會認知理論 (SCT) 和資源保存理論 (COR)，以闡明官僚拖延的多層次驅動因素。運用來自中國基層官僚的調查數據，我們採用了納入充分性和必要性兩種視角的雙邏輯方法。研究結果透過瓶頸重要性-績效地圖分析 (BIPMA) 視覺化呈現，揭示了干預措施的優先順序。組織認同脫穎而出成為最高優先事項，既是強而有力的充分因素，也是關鍵的必要條件。自我效能對於需要針對性支持的特定次群體構成中度障礙，而公共服務動機則作為一個基礎性先決條件，需要持續維護而非積極提升。結合緩解情緒耗竭的策略，這些見解有助於更具針對性地分配資源，以遏制官僚拖延。本研究透過提供減輕官僚拖延的可行性指導，並透過將雙邏輯分析應用於複雜的組織現象，提供了方法論上的貢獻，從而推進了官僚行為的研究。

papers.title: Reclaiming Weber: Bureaucracy as Democracy's Last Line of Defense
papers.abstract: Max Weber's rational–legal bureaucracy remains a vital safeguard amid populist backlash, civil service politicization, and democratic backsliding. This article reframes bureaucracy as a conditional democratic safeguard—one that depends on ethical orientation and professional integrity, not technical capacity alone. When legality is hollowed out through obedience or anticipatory compliance, institutions corrode from within. Evidence from recent cases of executive politicization illustrates how ethical substance erodes behind formally intact institutions. By integrating Weber's structural rationality with Waldo's claim that democracy is fundamentally an ethic requiring value‐laden judgment, the article develops the notion of a “compliance trap” and recasts public servants as ethical constitutional agents rather than passive implementers. It also advances a framework for bureaucratic renewal grounded in ethical discipline, participatory design, and professional autonomy, arguing that administrators must be prepared to exercise principled judgment when other democratic safeguards weaken.
papers.abstract_zh: 馬克斯．韋伯的法理型官僚體制在民粹反撲、文官體系政治化和民主倒退的背景下，仍是關鍵的保障。本文將官僚體制重新定位為一種有條件的民主保障，其效力取決於倫理導向和專業操守，而非僅僅是技術能力。當合法性透過服從或預期性服從而被掏空時，制度便會從內部腐蝕。近期行政部門政治化的案例證據闡明了，在形式上完好無損的制度背後，倫理內涵是如何被侵蝕的。透過整合韋伯的結構理性與瓦爾多（Waldo）關於民主本質上是一種需要價值判斷的倫理主張，本文發展了「服從陷阱」（compliance trap）的概念，並將公務員重新定位為倫理憲政代理人，而非被動的執行者。本文也提出了一個根植於倫理紀律、參與式設計和專業自主的官僚體制革新框架，主張當其他民主保障削弱時，行政人員必須準備好做出有原則的判斷。

papers.title: How a Government Bureaucracy Works. Review Essay on Caroline Howard Grøn and Anne Mette Møller. 2024. Public Bureaucracy and Digital Transformation: Structures, Practices and Values. Cham: Palgrave Macmillan (etcetera)
Did populist governance change corruption risks during crises across European countries?
papers.abstract: This study examines whether populist governance shaped public procurement corruption risks during COVID-19 across 23 EU Member States. Despite common emergency rules, corruption risks varied markedly. Using fuzzy-set Qualitative Comparative Analysis and the Corruption Risk Index, the study finds that populist governance combined with poor integrity norms is sufficient to explain high corruption risk increases. Populist-led governments intensify risks by undermining oversight, exploiting legal loopholes, and legitimizing rule-breaking through anti-elite narratives, particularly where accountability cultures are weak. Anti-corruption strategies must therefore account for crisis conditions and politicized governance, ensuring independent oversight mechanisms remain intact under populist rule.
papers.abstract_zh: 本研究探討在COVID-19疫情期間，民粹主義治理是否影響了23個歐盟成員國的公共採購貪腐風險。儘管存在共同的應急規定，貪腐風險卻顯著不同。本研究運用模糊集質性比較分析（fsQCA）和貪腐風險指數，發現民粹主義治理結合薄弱的廉政規範，足以解釋貪腐風險的顯著增加。民粹主義政府透過削弱監督、利用法律漏洞，並藉由反精英論述將違規行為正當化，從而加劇風險，尤其是在問責文化薄弱之處。因此，反貪腐策略必須考量危機情境和政治化的治理，確保在民粹主義統治下，獨立監督機制仍能保持完整。

papers.title: How does ethics reform in government affect moral reasoning and perceived discretion in patronage-prone organizations?
Statistical footprints in corruption measurement: general approach, with application to automobile license plates in Russia
papers.abstract: We offer a novel big data approach to corruption measurement by using statistical anomalies in publicly observable allocations affected by corruption. While individual corruption incidents remain undetectable, systemic corruption leaves measurable statistical footprints by affecting distributions of observable outcomes. We apply our approach to measuring corruption in the Russian traffic police, which issues automobile licence plates. Plates that signal status are found to be excessively concentrated among upmarket and luxurious classes and brands. We use these discrepancies to measure traffic police corruption, and discuss the potential of such approach in assessing the scale of abuse of power for private gains.
papers.abstract_zh: 我們提出一種新穎的巨量資料方法來衡量貪腐，透過利用受貪腐影響之公開可觀察分配中的統計異常現象。儘管個別貪腐事件仍無法偵測，系統性貪腐卻會透過影響可觀察結果的分布，留下可衡量的統計足跡。我們將此方法應用於衡量俄羅斯交通警察的貪腐，該單位負責核發汽車牌照。具有地位象徵的牌照被發現過度集中於高階與豪華車款品牌中。我們利用這些差異來衡量交通警察的貪腐，並探討此類方法在評估為謀取私利而濫用權力規模方面的潛力。

papers.title: Balancing Neutral and Responsive Competences in the Context of Functional Politicization
papers.abstract: Democratic governments can legitimately expect permanent civil servants to undertake functionally politicized tasks, such as providing political‐tactical advice. However, safeguarding the neutrality and legitimacy of a permanent civil service in the context of functional politicization necessitates that political considerations do not override professional judgment or impede the delivery of free, frank and fearless advice. Although existing research has documented functional politicization in permanent civil services situated in different politico–administrative systems, its behavioral implications remain insufficiently explored. Drawing on a survey of 901 senior permanent civil servants in managerial positions across Denmark's central, regional and local governments, this study finds that the engagement in functionally politicized tasks is associated with a higher likelihood of altering or omitting professional input in response to perceived political pressures. However, the study finds no significant relationship between functional politicization and civil servants' willingness to voice concerns to their superiors, which suggests that their capacity to provide free, frank and fearless advice remains intact.
papers.abstract_zh: 民主政府可以合理地期望常任文官承擔功能性政治化任務，例如提供政治戰術性建議。然而，在功能性政治化的背景下，維護常任文官體系的中立性與正當性，必須確保政治考量不凌駕於專業判斷之上，或阻礙提供自由、坦率且無所畏懼的建議。儘管既有研究已記錄了位於不同政治行政體系中的常任文官體系的功能性政治化現象，但其行為意涵仍未獲得充分探討。本研究基於對來自丹麥中央、區域及地方政府中，擔任管理職位的901名資深常任文官的調查，發現參與功能性政治化任務，與在回應感知到的政治壓力時，改變或省略專業意見的可能性更高有關。然而，本研究並未發現功能性政治化與文官向其上級表達關切的意願之間存在顯著關係，這表明他們提供自由、坦率且無所畏懼建議的能力仍保持完整。

papers.title: Improving non-executive directors’ judgement quality through information provision: a mixed-method study
papers.abstract: This study examines how information provision influences judgement quality of non-executive directors in the semipublic sector. Based on insights from behavioural science, hypotheses were developed and tested using a mixed-methods design, combining an experiment (N = 101) and group interviews (N = 34). The experiment with non-executive directors provides evidence for a causal relationship between information diversity and integrative complexity in judgements – a core indicator of judgement quality. However, findings from group interviews also highlight the challenge of gathering information, without undermining the trust-based relationship with the CEO. Finally, neither information diversity nor simultaneous order mitigates confirmation bias.
papers.abstract_zh: 本研究探討資訊提供如何影響半公營部門非執行董事的判斷品質。依據行為科學的見解，本研究發展並檢驗了假說，採用混合方法設計，結合實驗法 (N = 101) 和團體訪談 (N = 34)。針對非執行董事的實驗，證實了資訊多樣性與判斷中的整合複雜度之間存在因果關係，而整合複雜度是判斷品質的核心指標。然而，團體訪談的結果也突顯了在不損害與執行長 (CEO) 之間信任關係的前提下，蒐集資訊所面臨的挑戰。最後，無論是資訊多樣性還是同步順序，都無法減輕確認偏誤。

papers.title: Experimental Evidence on the Effect of Decision Justification Strategies on Citizen Perceptions of Government
papers.abstract: Abundant literature documents a range of factors that shape citizen perceptions of government. However, attention to how the justification of a policy decision shapes citizen perceptions remains limited. In this study, we consider how justifications influence citizen trust and legitimacy through a 2 × 2 × 2 pre-registered factorial survey experiment that manipulates justification strategy, policy position, and policy type. Results indicate that opposing positions reduce trust and legitimacy while the context of a highly polarized policy has the opposite effect. Emotive-based strategies decrease trust but do not affect legitimacy. Further, the effect of a supportive or opposing position varies by level of policy polarization.
papers.journal: The American Review of Public Administration
papers.abstract_zh: 豐富文獻探討了形塑公民政府觀感的諸多因素。然而，對於政策決策的正當性如何形塑公民觀感的關注仍屬有限。本研究透過一項2 × 2 × 2預先註冊的因子式問卷實驗，探討政策正當性如何影響公民信任與政府合法性，該實驗操弄了正當化策略、政策立場與政策類型。結果顯示，對立立場會降低信任與合法性，而高度兩極化政策的情境則產生相反效果。情感訴求策略會降低信任，但不影響合法性。此外，支持或反對立場的效果會因政策兩極化程度而異。

papers.title: Governing Street‐Level Bureaucracies: The Organizational Shaping of Caseworkers. By KerstinJacobsson and HåkanJohansson, London: Routledge, 2025. 166 pp. $160.00 (hardcover) ISBN: 978‐1‐03‐233194‐2
Does Size Matter for the Relationship Between Politics and Administration?
papers.abstract: Owing to public administrations' expansion of their roles in policy design and coordination, concerns about bureaucratic power have reemerged across democratic systems. However, little is known concerning how elected politicians experience and interpret administrative influence, particularly in local governments, in which administrative capacity often rivals political authority. This study examined how local politicians perceive administrative influence and how these perceptions vary across organizational scales and party affiliations. Using survey data from Norwegian municipal politicians, this study found that administrative influence is perceived as a normal, bounded aspect of governance, rather than bureaucratic domination. However, perceptions vary systematically by municipal size; politicians in larger municipalities report stronger administrative influence, reflecting greater specialization and delegation. These perceptions were further conditioned by political interpretations. Elite skeptical representatives evaluated administrative influence more negatively, particularly in larger jurisdictions, demonstrating how administrative power is institutionally structured and politically interpreted, offering insights relevant to governance systems globally.
papers.abstract_zh: 由於公共行政機關在政策設計與協調方面角色擴張，對於官僚權力的擔憂在各民主體制中再次浮現。然而，對於民選政治人物如何體驗與詮釋行政影響力，卻鮮少有研究探討，特別是在行政能力往往與政治權威不相上下的地方政府中。本研究檢視了地方政治人物如何感知行政影響力，以及這些感知如何因組織規模與政黨歸屬而異。本研究利用挪威市鎮政治人物的問卷調查資料，發現行政影響力被視為治理中正常且有限的一環，而非官僚宰制。然而，這些感知會因市鎮規模而系統性地變化；較大市鎮的政治人物回報更強的行政影響力，這反映了更高的專業化與授權程度。這些感知進一步受到政治詮釋的制約。疑菁英論的代表對行政影響力評價更為負面，特別是在較大的管轄區內，這顯示了行政權力是如何在制度上被建構並在政治上被詮釋的，為全球治理體系提供了相關見解。

papers.title: Interagency collaboration, broker organization, and bureaucratic responsiveness: how public agencies fix complex citizen requests on digital government platforms?
papers.abstract: The widespread adoption of digital platforms has led to a surge in citizen requests. Although inter-agency collaboration is viewed as a crucial mechanism for resolving complex citizen requests, our understanding of its effectiveness remains limited. This study examines how inter-agency collaboration influences bureaucratic responsiveness in resolving complex requests on digital government platforms in China. The findings reveal that inter-agency collaboration significantly reduces resolution rates, a phenomenon known as ‘collaborative failure’. This failure stems from motivational barriers related to responsibility reluctance, risk aversion, and hierarchical sensitivity, wherein broker organizations with higher political authority can mitigate such barriers.
papers.abstract_zh: 數位平臺的普及，使得公民請求大量湧現。儘管跨機關協作被視為解決複雜公民請求的關鍵機制，但我們對其有效性的理解仍相當有限。本研究旨在探討跨機關協作如何影響中國數位政府平臺上，複雜請求解決過程中的官僚回應性。研究結果揭示，跨機關協作顯著降低了請求的解決率，此一現象被稱為「協作失靈」。這種失靈源於與責任規避、風險規避和層級敏感性相關的動機障礙；其中，具有較高政治權威的中介組織能夠有效緩解此類障礙。

papers.title: Regional bombs and public labor obligations
papers.abstract: This study examines the long-term effects of wartime experiences on individual contributions to local public labor obligations, seen as a form of self-provision of public services. Analyzing data from one of the most intensive regional bombing campaigns in history during the Vietnam War and six national census waves, I identify a U-shaped pattern in the causal relationships using an instrumental variable (IV). These findings indicate that individuals with wartime exposure initially contribute less to public labor obligations. Their contributions increase when they endure high-intensity regional bombings. This pattern is particularly evident in Northern Vietnam, rural regions, and among people born before 1975. The findings make a novel contribution to our understanding of the long-term effects of early-life adversities on public service activities.
papers.abstract_zh: 本研究旨在探討戰爭經驗對個人參與地方公共勞務義務的長期影響，此義務被視為一種公共服務的自主提供形式。透過分析越南戰爭期間歷史上最密集的高強度區域轟炸行動之一的資料，以及六次全國人口普查波次，並運用工具變數 (IV) 方法，本研究發現因果關係呈現U型模式。這些研究結果顯示，具有戰爭暴露經驗的個體起初對公共勞務義務的貢獻較少，但當他們承受高強度區域轟炸時，其貢獻會增加。這種模式在越南北部、農村地區以及1975年前出生的人群中尤其顯著。這些發現對我們理解早期生活逆境對公共服務活動的長期影響，提供了新穎的貢獻。

papers.title: Playing with Time: Data Manipulation within the Performance Evaluation Cycle
papers.abstract: Understanding why public organizations manipulate performance data has become an essential theme in public administration scholarship. While prior research has extensively explored the individual and contextual drivers of gaming, the temporal dimension–specifically when manipulation occurs–remains remarkably underexplored. Moving beyond the impact of sporadic political events, this study examines the routine, institutionalized rhythms of the bureaucratic calendar. Utilizing satellite nighttime light data as an objective benchmark to detect distortion in officially reported GDP across 271 Chinese cities (2013–2020), we uncover a systematic, cyclical pattern of strategic gaming. Manipulation is substantial in the first quarter, consistent with political pressure for a “good start”, recedes during the middle of the year, and surges to its annual peak in the fourth quarter (Q4) as the final performance assessment looms. Furthermore, we show that this Q4 effect is contingent on local context: cities with lower fiscal autonomy and reduced marketization exhibit a significantly greater propensity to inflate year-end figures. By uncovering a routine form of manipulation embedded in bureaucratic practices, our study advances theories of performance gaming and sheds light on the strategic use of time in public management.
papers.journal: Journal of Public Administration Research and Theory
papers.abstract_zh: 探討公共組織為何操弄績效數據，已成為公共行政學術研究中的一個重要課題。儘管既有研究已廣泛探討績效操弄的個體與情境驅動因素，但時間面向——特別是操弄發生的時機——仍顯著地缺乏探討。本研究超越偶發性政治事件的影響，轉而檢視官僚體制運作時程中例行性、制度化的規律。本研究採用衛星夜間燈光資料作為客觀衡量基準，以檢測271個中國城市 (2013-2020年) 官方公布國內生產毛額(GDP)數據中的失真，從而揭示了策略性績效操弄的系統性、循環性模式。操弄在第一季顯著，符合追求「開門紅」的政治壓力；在年中趨緩；並隨著最終績效考核的逼近，在第四季 (Q4) 達到年度高峰。此外，本研究亦指出，此第四季效應取決於地方脈絡：財政自主性較低且市場化程度較低的城市，展現出顯著更高的虛報年終數據傾向。透過揭露一種根植於官僚實務的例行性操弄形式，本研究不僅推進了績效操弄的相關理論，也闡明了公共管理中時間的策略性運用方式。

papers.title: The Voice of the Voiceless: Refugees’ Perceptions of Participation Under Constraint
papers.abstract: Refugee camps have evolved into durable governance sites characterized by centralized authority and monopolistic service environments where residents lack ‘exit’ options. While public administration scholarship extensively theorizes the benefits of participation, research often assumes a baseline of stable, democratic institutions, leaving ‘participation under constraint’ underdeveloped. This study examines whether ‘thin’ participation—awareness of feedback mechanisms and consultative outreach—is associated with refugees’ perceived outcomes at individual, community, and institutional levels. Using household-level survey data from 876 households across 33 refugee sites Cox’s Bazar, Bangladesh, we find that both latent awareness and consultation are significantly associated with improved subjective well-being. Our findings reveal a tiered impact: passive awareness correlates with community and institutional gains, while the relational intensity of consultation is required for individual-level improvements. These results suggest that even minimal engagement functions as a vital generative mechanism for institutional legitimacy in high-dependency, non-democratic environments.
papers.journal: Journal of Public Administration Research and Theory
papers.abstract_zh: 難民營已演變為持久的治理場域，其特徵為集中式權威和壟斷性服務環境，在此居民缺乏「退出」選項。儘管公共行政學術界廣泛地探討參與的益處，研究卻常假設穩定的民主制度為基礎，使得「受限下的參與」發展不足。本研究探討「薄弱」參與—即對回饋機制和諮詢外展的認知—是否與難民在個人、社群和機構層面的感知結果相關。本研究利用來自孟加拉國科克斯巴扎爾33個難民營的876個家戶層級調查資料，發現潛在認知和諮詢都顯著地與改善的主觀幸福感相關。我們的研究結果揭示了分層的影響：被動認知與社群和機構層面的獲益相關，而諮詢的關係強度則是個人層面改善所必需的。這些結果表明，即使是最低限度的參與，也能作為一個重要的生成機制，促進高度依賴、非民主環境中的機構合法性。

papers.title: Resolving Agile Ambidexterity: Between Ambivalence, Adaptation, and Accommodation
papers.abstract: Public bureaucracies address challenging and complex problems by applying agile work practices when standard operating procedures or routines fail. In these situations, public managers need to decide whether to exploit existing bureaucratic routines or explore novel solutions through non‐routine agile work practices. This study shows how public managers maneuver between different adoption decisions: (1) remain ambivalent and reject agile, (2) accommodate the needs of the bureaucracy and adjust agile work practices to align with administrative routines, or (3) adapt in an ambidextrous manner by becoming agile literate and choosing the appropriate work practices depending on the public management problem. This study contributes to the literature on agile governance by incorporating the notion of ambidexterity into the existing theory of 21st‐century bureaucracy.
papers.abstract_zh: 當標準作業程序或例行公事失效時，公部門科層體制會透過應用敏捷工作實務來處理具挑戰性且複雜的問題。在這些情況下，公部門管理者需要決定是利用現有的科層體制例行公事，還是透過非例行性的敏捷工作實務來探索新穎的解決方案。本研究闡述了公部門管理者如何在不同的採用決策之間權衡：(1) 保持矛盾並拒絕敏捷；(2) 順應科層體制的需求，並調整敏捷工作實務以符合行政例行公事；或 (3) 透過成為敏捷素養者，並根據公共管理問題選擇適當的工作實務，以雙元方式進行調適。本研究透過將雙元性概念納入現有的21世紀科層體制理論中，為敏捷治理的文獻做出貢獻。

papers.title: Awareness, Costs, and Take-up of Social Benefits: Evidence from a Field Experiment in China
papers.abstract: This study examines incomplete participation in social benefit programs by focusing on individual income tax refund claims in China. Despite growing evidence on this issue, there remains a need to directly compare the effectiveness of addressing behavioral barriers versus alleviating administrative burdens in promoting program take-up. Moreover, when administrative burdens are targeted, it is unclear whether reducing learning, compliance, or psychological costs is most effective. To address these questions, we investigate how policy interventions designed to enhance program awareness and reduce participation costs affect individuals’ tax refund take-up. In collaboration with a local taxation bureau in China, we conducted a randomized field experiment involving approximately 23,000 eligible taxpayers assigned to different intervention groups. Using administrative data, we tracked their tax refund filing activities during the settlement period. Results show that awareness-enhancing interventions increased take-up by 2.19 percentage points, whereas cost-reduction efforts yielded limited or unintended negative effects.
papers.journal: Journal of Public Administration Research and Theory
papers.abstract_zh: 本研究透過聚焦於中國的個人所得稅退稅申報，探討社會福利計畫中參與不完全的問題。儘管關於此議題的證據日益增多，但仍有必要直接比較解決行為障礙與減輕行政負擔在促進計畫參與率方面的有效性。此外，當針對行政負擔進行干預時，尚不清楚降低學習成本、遵循成本或心理成本何者最為有效。為了解決這些問題，我們探討旨在提高計畫認知度並降低參與成本的政策干預措施，如何影響個人的退稅參與率。我們與中國的一個地方稅務局合作，進行了一項隨機實地實驗，涉及約23,000名符合資格的納稅人，他們被分配到不同的干預組。運用行政資料，我們追蹤了他們在結算期間的退稅申報活動。結果顯示，提高認知度的干預措施使參與率增加了2.19個百分點，而降低成本的努力則產生了有限或意想不到的負面影響。

papers.title: Paradoxical tensions as catalysts: a phenomenon-based study of employee-driven innovation in the civil service
papers.abstract: The paradox of innovation in civil service contexts lies in the simultaneous need for both innovation and risk avoidance within government operations. Our qualitative study, involving 125 Irish civil servants, explores employee-driven innovation (EDI) through a paradox lens to unveil four continua of opposing forces: stability vs. change; bureaucracy vs. flexibility; hierarchical control vs. individual empowerment; and siloization vs. integration. We evidence how managers act as agents to reconcile these tensions to facilitate employee-driven innovation, thus rendering tensions as catalysts for innovation rather than mere contextual factors. We discuss the implications for both theory and practice of EDI.
papers.abstract_zh: 公務體系中的創新悖論在於政府運作同時需要創新與規避風險。我們的質性研究針對125位愛爾蘭公務員進行，透過悖論視角探討員工驅動式創新（EDI），揭示了四個對立力量的連續體：穩定性與變革、官僚體制與彈性、層級控制與個人賦權，以及筒倉化與整合。我們闡明了管理者如何作為促成者來化解這些張力，以促進員工驅動式創新，從而使這些張力成為創新的催化劑，而非僅僅是情境因素。我們討論了本研究對於員工驅動式創新（EDI）在理論與實務上的意涵。

papers.title: Selection Method, Partisanship, and Performance of Government Oversight Functions
papers.abstract: This study examines how the selection of public sector leaders affects organizational outcomes, especially in oversight functions where independence is expected. Political economy literature suggests that elected leaders better respond to voter preferences, while appointed leaders possess more expertise. Drawing on public administration theories of political control of the bureaucracy, we posit that, regardless of the selection method, public sector leaders as agents are subject to the influence of political principals with authority over the selection process. When the principal's interest is not aligned with the public interest, as seen in government oversight functions, its influence could compromise the performance of the selected leaders. Focusing on state auditors, the study finds that on average, selection methods are not correlated with audit findings, but an auditor whose political principal shares the same party affiliation as the auditee (the state governor) is less likely to identify financial management deficiencies.
papers.abstract_zh: 本研究探討公部門領導者之選任方式如何影響組織績效，尤其是在預期應具獨立性的監督職能中。政治經濟學文獻指出，經選舉產生的領導者更能回應選民偏好，而經任命的領導者則擁有更多專業知識。借鑒公共行政學中關於官僚體系政治控制的理論，本研究主張，無論選任方式為何，公部門領導者作為代理人，均受掌握選任過程權力的政治委託人影響。當委託人的利益與公共利益不一致時，尤其是在政府監督職能中，其影響可能損害被選任領導者的績效。本研究以州審計官為研究對象，發現平均而言，選任方式與審計結果並無關聯，但若審計官的政治委託人與受審計者（州長）具有相同政黨歸屬，則較不可能發現財務管理上的缺失。

papers.title: Rethinking Budgeting? An Analysis of Budget Theory and Reform for Modernizing Municipal Practice
papers.abstract: This study examines the persistent gap between budget theory and practice in local governments, using the Government Finance Officers Association's (GFOA) Rethinking Budgeting Initiative as a case study. Analyzing 32 GFOA publications from 2020 to 2024, we identify four key themes in the GFOA's attempt to modernize budgetary decision‐making: public values, behavioral science, coordination and collaboration, and fiscal prudence. Through a narrative synthesis grounded in budget theory, we find normative theories align with reforms emphasizing participatory practices and public values, while descriptive theories underpin traditional fiscal approaches. The endurance of incremental budgeting, despite reformist rhetoric, underscores the challenge of transforming budget practice. Our findings suggest meaningful reform depends on integrating behavioral insights, stakeholder collaboration, and value‐driven goals with theoretical frameworks. Ultimately, this study contributes to scholarly discourse by highlighting opportunities to advance budget theory and improve practitioner engagement, offering a pathway for more adaptive and responsive local government budgeting practices.
papers.abstract_zh: 本研究探討地方政府預算理論與實務之間持續存在的落差，並以政府財務官員協會 (GFOA) 的「預算重思倡議」作為案例研究。透過分析 GFOA 於 2020 至 2024 年間發布的 32 份出版品，我們歸納出 GFOA 在試圖現代化預算決策時的四個關鍵主題：公共價值、行為科學、協調與合作，以及財政審慎。透過根植於預算理論的敘事綜合分析，我們發現規範性理論與強調參與式實踐和公共價值的改革相符，而描述性理論則支撐著傳統的財政方法。儘管改革言論不斷，漸進式預算編列的持續存在凸顯了轉變預算實務的挑戰。我們的研究結果表明，有意義的改革取決於將行為洞察、利害關係人合作和價值導向目標與理論框架整合。最終，本研究透過突顯推進預算理論和提升實務工作者參與的機會，有助於學術論述，為地方政府預算實務提供一條更具適應性和回應性的途徑。

papers.title: The Politics of Collaborative Public Management: A Primer. By RobertAgranoff and AlexeiKolpakov, New York: Routledge, 2023. 278 pp. $55.99 (hardback). ISBN: 978‐1‐03‐247362‐8
Stimulating Pro‐Environmental Behavior Using Management Control: Survey Evidence From a City Government
papers.abstract: This paper investigates how pro‐environmental behaviors (PEBs) of public sector employees can be stimulated using management control. We mobilize the theory of planned behavior to hypothesize that employee environmental concerns are associated with PEBs, and that this relation can be strengthened by management control instruments that provide structure and signals about prevailing norms. Using survey data from 151 public sector employees, we find support for most of our expectations. Specifically, our findings suggest that sustainability‐related output controls (e.g., sustainable performance budgets and accounting reports) can help employees to translate their environmental concerns into action through PEBs. Furthermore, we find that behavior controls (e.g., formats that incorporate sustainability and resilience‐enhancing action programs) positively associate with PEBs, regardless of employees' initial environmental concerns. Taken together, our findings have implications for public sector organizations seeking to stimulate employees to engage in more environmentally sustainable behaviors.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文探討如何運用管理控制來激勵公部門員工的親環境行為 (PEBs)。本研究援引計畫行為理論，假設員工的環境關懷與親環境行為相關，且此關係可透過提供結構並傳達現行規範的管理控制工具而強化。運用來自151位公部門員工的問卷資料，本研究發現大部分預期獲得支持。具體而言，本研究結果顯示，永續相關的產出控制（例如：永續績效預算和會計報告）能協助員工將其環境關懷透過親環境行為轉化為實際行動。此外，本研究發現，行為控制（例如：納入永續與提升韌性行動方案的格式）與親環境行為呈正相關，無論員工最初的環境關懷程度如何。總體而言，本研究結果對於旨在激勵員工從事更多環境永續行為的公部門組織具有啟示。

papers.title: American Society for Public Administration Code of Ethics
papers.abstract: Approved by the ASPA National Council March 16, 2013, along with Practices for carrying out the Code available at www.aspanet.org/CodeofEthics. In 2014, the Ethics and Standards Implementation Committee was created to advance awareness of ethics in public service, provide advice and assistance to members in handling ethical problems, and review and seek to resolve ethics complaints regarding members who may have violated the Code.
papers.abstract_zh: 本準則經ASPA全國理事會於2013年3月16日核准，其執行規範詳見www.aspanet.org/CodeofEthics。2014年，倫理與標準實施委員會成立，旨在提升公務倫理意識，在處理倫理問題上向會員提供建議與協助，並審查及尋求解決關於可能違反本準則之會員的倫理申訴。

papers.title: Celebrating 85 Years
Issue Information
The Diffusion of Local Administrative Innovation: Investigating Municipal Climate Managers in the State of Hessen in Central Germany
papers.abstract: Many cities and municipalities aim to address climate change, yet their rigid administrative structures often constrain effective action. Therefore, local authorities must innovate to build administrative capacity and enable work across departmental silos. However, we lack knowledge of how such administrative innovations emerge and become more widespread. To address this gap, this article examines administrative innovation from a diffusion perspective, drawing on a novel theoretical framework of soft diffusion channels. It studies the establishment of climate manager positions across all 426 municipalities in the German state of Hessen between 2008 and 2023. Event history models suggest that the creation of these positions, most with federal grant support, is associated with various diffusion channels, including county‐level policy examples and membership in a state‐run climate network, as well as additional capacity indicators. Thus, the diffusion of local administrative innovation resembles a multi‐channel process that practitioners at different government levels can actively support.
papers.abstract_zh: 許多城市和地方政府旨在應對氣候變遷，然而其僵化的行政結構經常限制了有效的作為。因此，地方政府必須創新以建立行政量能，並促成跨部門協作。然而，我們對於這些行政創新如何產生並擴散缺乏了解。為彌補此一知識鴻溝，本文從擴散觀點檢視行政創新，並借鑒一套關於軟性擴散管道的新穎理論框架。本文研究了2008年至2023年間，德國黑森邦 (Hessen) 所有426個地方政府中氣候經理人職位的設立情況。事件史模型結果顯示，這些職位的設立（其中大多數獲得聯邦補助支持）與多種擴散管道相關，包括郡級政策範例、加入邦營氣候網絡，以及額外的量能指標。因此，地方行政創新的擴散類似於一個多管道的過程，不同層級的政府實務工作者可以積極支持。

papers.title: Organizational strategies for system robustness: how managers navigate the institutional architecture of complex systems
papers.abstract: Many public managers oversee complex systems that require them to navigate multifaceted organizational decision-making processes. While there is general recognition that institutions constrain information processing, rigorous study of how particular institutional designs influence the strategies used by organizations to process information and act on the systems they oversee is limited by existing theory and methodological approaches. We propose a theoretical approach that integrates established understanding of institutions as choice architectures and disproportionate information processing in organizations with new understanding of collective inference from cognitive science. The approach addresses three limitations in existing theory: (1) the relationship between detailed institutional designs and organizational strategies, (2) the role of flexibility in information processing, and (3) the relationship between organizational strategies and system robustness. We demonstrate its application empirically using a mixed methods approach that combines institutional analysis and process tracing with a dynamic model to analyze how the City of Phoenix Water Services Department responded to environmental change through investment and ratemaking actions. Our findings highlight how institutional designs that require managers to account for multiple objectives benefit from added flexibility, allowing managers to explore new approaches that address competing objectives and increase system robustness. Conversely, designs exhibiting high costs without high flexibility may create rigidity traps that hinder action and reduce system robustness in the face of uncertainty.
papers.journal: Journal of Public Administration Research and Theory
papers.abstract_zh: 許多公共管理者負責管理複雜系統，這要求他們駕馭多面向的組織決策流程。儘管普遍認知制度會約束資訊處理，但關於特定制度設計如何影響組織處理資訊並對其所管理系統採取行動的策略，對此的嚴謹研究卻受限於現有理論與方法論途徑。我們提出一種理論途徑，整合了將制度視為選擇架構的既有理解、組織中不成比例的資訊處理，以及認知科學中對集體推論的新理解。此途徑解決了現有理論的三個限制：(一) 詳細制度設計與組織策略之間的關係，(二) 資訊處理中彈性的作用，以及 (三) 組織策略與系統韌性之間的關係。我們以實證方式展示其應用，採用混合方法途徑，結合制度分析與過程追蹤，並搭配動態模型，以分析鳳凰城市水務局如何透過投資和費率制定行動應對環境變化。我們的研究結果強調，要求管理者考量多重目標的制度設計，將受益於額外的彈性，讓管理者得以探索解決相互衝突目標的新方法，並提升系統韌性。相反地，缺乏高度彈性卻伴隨高成本的設計，可能會形成僵化陷阱，阻礙行動，進而降低系統在不確定性下的韌性。

papers.title: Key Practices of Knowledge Mobilization in Local Policy Settings
papers.abstract: The literature on knowledge mobilization (KM) acknowledges the complex processes involved in the application of evidence to policy. However, the everyday activities employed by knowledge mobilizers to facilitate these processes have proved difficult to capture and codify. We address this gap in current understanding through empirical analysis of the practices used to mobilize knowledge in local policy making. We find that effective KM is characterized by relational interactions with diverse actors across research, policy and practice settings; constant and consistent engagement with the local and policy contexts in which evidence is being applied; and the integration of different types of knowledge (including research findings, professional expertise and lived experience) to collectively respond to policy and practice needs. These practices of KM have important implications for how evidence is defined, validated, and used by policymakers and practitioners.
papers.abstract_zh: 知識轉化 (KM) 相關文獻體認到將實證應用於政策所涉及的複雜過程。然而，知識轉化者為促進這些過程所採用的日常實踐，卻難以捕捉與編碼。本研究透過對地方政策制定中知識轉化實踐的實證分析，旨在彌補當前理解上的不足。我們發現，有效的知識轉化具有以下特點：與跨越研究、政策和實務場域的多元行動者進行關係性互動；持續且一致地投入實證應用所處的地方與政策脈絡；以及整合不同類型的知識（包括研究發現、專業知識和生活經驗），以共同回應政策與實務需求。這些知識轉化實踐對於政策制定者與實務工作者如何定義、驗證和使用實證，具有重要意涵。

papers.title: Unleashing the potential of participative budgeting practices in Public Healthcare Organizations: The drivers of psychology-based budgeting research
papers.abstract: Since doctors heading operational units have become budget holders, the hybrid nature of doctor-managers exposes them to risks of role ambiguity. Drawing on psychology-based budgeting research, this study explores how participative budgeting (PB) can enhance managerial responses to budgetary responsibilities. Using data from 131 doctor-managers in Italian public healthcare organizations, we found that providing satisfactory budgetary information influences doctor-managers’ perceptions of organizational support (POS). The ‘reciprocating’ response driven by POS strengthens doctor-managers’ motivation to achieve budgetary goals and involvement in PB, acting as an enabling condition for role hybridization. This results in improvements in psychological well-being and organizational identification.
papers.abstract_zh: 由於擔任營運單位主管的醫師已身兼預算負責人，醫師經理人身分的雙重性使其面臨角色模糊的風險。本研究借鑒心理學取向的預算編制研究，探討參與式預算 (PB) 如何增強管理者對預算責任的回應。本研究利用來自義大利公共醫療機構中 131 位醫師經理人的數據，發現提供令人滿意的預算資訊會影響醫師經理人的組織支持知覺 (POS)。由組織支持知覺 (POS) 所驅動的「互惠」回應，強化了醫師經理人達成預算目標的動機以及對參與式預算的投入，並作為角色混合的促成條件。這進而提升了心理福祉和組織認同。

papers.title: Issue Information
Co-creation in commissioning complex public services: towards an adaptive system for continuous improvement
papers.abstract: This article explores co-creation to address complex societal problems in the interconnected domains of health, welfare, and security. An instrumental case study examines the innovative outcome-based commissioning of public services for people engaging in problematic drug use in a Finnish city. We apply abductive content analysis to interviews with public and private stakeholders, documents, and statistics gathered from 2015 to 2021. The findings suggest that co-creation, co-production, and co-destruction combine to form an adaptive system that can foster continuous improvement in the provision of public value.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文探討協同創造如何解決健康、福利與安全等相互關聯領域中的複雜社會問題。一項工具性個案研究，檢視了芬蘭某城市針對藥物濫用者所提供的公共服務中，創新的成果導向委託模式。我們運用溯因內容分析法，分析2015年至2021年間收集的公共與私人利害關係人訪談、文件及統計數據。研究結果顯示，協同創造、協同生產與協同破壞結合形成一個適應性系統，有助於促進公共價值提供上的持續改善。

papers.title: Anchoring during a storm: unveiling the role of Anchor institutions in place-based public service ecosystems during disruption
papers.abstract: This article investigates the role of an Anchor Institution (Anchor) within a place-based public service ecosystem (PSE) during disruption. Specifically, it examines how Anchors shape the conditions under which actors can participate in value creation. Drawing on a qualitative single-case study of the University of Siena, an Anchor embedded in a city-campus where students, services, and territorial actors are closely intertwined, we show how disruption activates the Anchor’s multi-level role unevenly. While some actors are enabled to participate and mobilize resources for value creation, others are constrained from doing so. Crucially, we also theorize a new relational mechanism, which we term ‘reverse anchoring’. This mechanism captures how other PSE actors mobilize resources (e.g. venues) to support the restoration of the Anchor’s multi-level role. In doing so, the article offers a novel account of PSE robustness, showing that it also arises from the involvement of peripheral PSE actors.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文探討在擾動期間，錨定機構（Anchor）在地公共服務生態系統（PSE）中所扮演的角色。具體而言，本研究檢視錨定機構如何形塑行動者得以參與價值創造的條件。本文借鑒一項以錫耶納大學為例的質性單一案例研究，該大學是一個根植於城鎮校園的錨定機構，學生、服務與在地行動者在此緊密交織。研究結果顯示，擾動如何不均勻地啟動錨定機構的多層次角色。儘管有些行動者得以參與並動員資源進行價值創造，其他行動者卻受限而無法做到。關鍵的是，本研究也提出一種新的關係機制，我們稱之為「反向錨定」（reverse anchoring）。此機制闡明了其他PSE行動者如何動員資源（例如：場地）以支持錨定機構多層次角色的恢復。藉此，本文對PSE韌性提供了一個新穎的解釋，顯示其也源於周邊PSE行動者的參與。

papers.title: The Disconnection of Advocacy and Analysis in Public Administration: A Critique of Robust Governance
papers.abstract: A strength of public administration as a discipline is that it is concerned with both the analysis and advocacy. It explores the working of public institutions and wider systems of governance but also proposes reform mechanisms to improve their functioning. But these combined tasks are often conducted as if they were in separate worlds, to the detriment of the advocacy role. This failing, in turn, leads the advocacy arm of public administration regularly down a path of misunderstanding the nature of reform, over‐estimating the prospects for institutional change and not grasping the role of politics in any change. We use the case of the recent promotion of “robust governance” to illustrate our argument.
papers.abstract_zh: 公共行政學作為一門學科，其優勢在於兼顧分析與倡議。它探討公共機構與更廣泛治理體系的運作，同時也提出改革機制以改善其運作。然而，這些綜合任務卻常被視為互不相干，損害了倡議角色的發揮。這種缺失進而導致公共行政的倡議面向，經常誤解改革的本質、過度高估制度變革的前景，且未能掌握政治在任何變革中的作用。我們以近期推動的「穩健治理」為例，闡明我們的論點。

papers.title: Creating Human Value as Public Management Theory
papers.abstract: Joseph Drew’s Creating Human Value as Public Management Theory departs from the critical observation that contemporary public management theory has systematically marginalized the very subject at t...
papers.abstract_zh: 約瑟夫·德魯的《創造人類價值作為公共管理理論》始於一項批判性觀察，即當代公共管理理論已系統性地邊緣化了其核心主題...

papers.title: Understanding co-production with vulnerable populations: challenges, enablers and outcomes
papers.abstract: Co-production emerged to engage users in public services as an intrinsic source of value and a democratic right, generating empowerment and social capital. This normative promise is undermined by an equity problem: vulnerable populations face barriers to full participation and are systematically excluded from co-productive processes despite having the greatest need for public services. Although attention to this issue has grown, the literature lacks a comprehensive cross-sector, cross-population analysis. A systematic literature review combining bibliometric mapping with qualitative narrative synthesis is conducted, placing vulnerability and its consequences for the co-production process at the centre of inquiry. This article contributes to co-production theory by highlighting the limits of standard assumptions for vulnerable populations, and offers practical implications for designing inclusive co-production processes.
papers.abstract_zh: 協同生產的出現旨在讓使用者參與公共服務，視其為內在價值來源與民主權利，並產生賦權與社會資本。然而，這項規範性承諾卻因公平性問題而受損：弱勢族群面臨充分參與的障礙，儘管他們對公共服務的需求最大，卻系統性地被排除在協同生產過程之外。儘管對此議題的關注日益增加，文獻卻缺乏全面的跨部門、跨族群分析。本文進行了一項系統性文獻回顧，結合文獻計量繪圖與質性敘事綜合分析，將脆弱性及其對協同生產過程的影響置於探究的核心。本文透過突顯標準假設對弱勢族群的局限性，對協同生產理論有所貢獻，並為設計具包容性的協同生產過程提供實務意涵。

papers.title: When you make and buy: understanding service delivery portfolios in concurrent sourcing
papers.abstract: Concurrent sourcing, the simultaneous use of in-house provision and contracting out, remains underexplored. This study examines how the allocation between in-house and contracted modes in service delivery portfolios affects service performance. Using panel data on children’s social care services provided by English local authorities from 2014 to 2023, we find that concentrated portfolios, in which one delivery mode dominates and the other plays a supporting role, are associated with better performance. By contrast, dominant mode itself and the mix of contractor types within outsourced provision show limited influence. The findings highlight portfolio design as central to concurrent sourcing.
papers.abstract_zh: 並行採購，即同時採用內部供應與委外服務，仍未獲得充分探討。本研究探討服務提供組合中，內部與委外模式之間的配置如何影響服務績效。本研究利用2014年至2023年間英國地方政府提供的兒童社會福利服務面板資料，發現集中式組合（即其中一種交付模式佔主導地位，另一種則扮演輔助角色）與較佳績效相關。相較之下，主導模式本身以及委外服務中承攬商類型的組合則影響有限。本研究結果突顯組合設計對於並行採購至關重要。

papers.title: Beyond co-creation: how non-profit organizations create public value in complex social challenges
papers.abstract: This article explores how public value is created in the complex and contested field of refugee integration, identifing three key arenas – service delivery, social and community activities, and advocacy – whereby NPOs create value in the multiple domains of refugee integration. We develop a conceptual model illustrating mechanisms of public value creation from the perspective of NPOs (full co-creation, societal creation of value between volunteers and service users only, and contestation), highlighting the roles of local and refugee volunteers. We contribute to public management scholarship by advancing theoretical understanding of how value is created in politicized policy fields and by whom.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文旨在探討公共價值如何在複雜且充滿爭議的難民融合領域中產生，並指出非營利組織（NPOs）透過服務提供、社會與社區活動以及倡議這三個關鍵場域，在難民融合的多元面向中創造價值。本研究建立了一個概念模型，從非營利組織的角度闡釋公共價值創造的機制（包括完全共創、僅限志工與服務使用者之間的社會價值創造，以及爭議），並強調在地志工與難民志工的角色。本文透過推進關於價值如何在政治化的政策領域中產生以及由誰產生的理論理解，對公共管理學術領域有所貢獻。

papers.title: Building collaborative governance from scratch: the significance of recalibration and reaffirmation in boundary work
papers.abstract: This paper examines the dynamics of actors’ boundary work in collaborative governance. While widely studied, how actors navigate collaborative governance from its inception has been underexplored. Drawing on a longitudinal ethnographic study tracing actors’ struggles over boundaries in response to a collaboration mandate, this paper demonstrates (1) how the design (configurational boundary work) of collaborative governance inadvertently and sometimes adversely affects the collaboration; (2) how collaborative governance remains ‘under construction’ as actors switch between competitive and collaborative boundary work; and (3) how actors continually engage in ‘recalibration’ and ‘reaffirmation’ of boundary work in response to changing circumstances, tasks, and actors.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文探討行動者在協作治理中進行邊界工作的動態。儘管協作治理已被廣泛研究，但行動者如何從其建立之初駕馭協作治理，卻未被充分探討。本文基於一項縱貫民族誌研究，該研究追溯行動者為回應一項協作要求而在邊界上進行的掙扎，並闡明：(1) 協作治理的設計（配置性邊界工作）如何無意中，有時甚至不利地影響協作；(2) 隨著行動者在競爭性與協作性邊界工作之間切換，協作治理如何持續處於「建構中」的狀態；以及 (3) 行動者如何為應對不斷變化的情境、任務和行動者，持續地參與邊界工作的「重新校準」與「再確認」。

papers.title: Forged through forces: configurations to digital policy attention in local governments
papers.abstract: Although governments’ digital policy attention is pivotal for effective digital governance, the mechanisms shaping attention remain insufficiently understood. Drawing on an integrated view of institutional environment, task environment, and resource endowment, we analyse 272 Chinese prefecture-level cities using a hybrid fsQCA – regression method to examine how multiple conditions jointly shape attention to digital transformation. We find that normative pressure, fiscal capacity, economic conditions, and digital infrastructure provide the foundation for high policy attention. Beyond this base, we identify three configurations across these dimensions: capability alignment, where leaders with technocratic backgrounds and digital culture jointly foster endogenous commitment; pressure compliance, where coercive, mimetic, and normative pressures jointly drive policy attention; and peer learning adaptation, where governments enhance attention through horizontal emulation when top-down mandates are weak. Regression analyses show that pressure compliance exerts the strongest influence on digital policy attention. These findings reveal configurational dynamics underlying digital governance.
papers.abstract_zh: 儘管政府對數位政策的關注對於有效的數位治理至關重要，但影響關注度的機制仍未被充分理解。本研究借鑒制度環境、任務環境和資源稟賦的整合觀點，分析了中國272個地級市，採用混合式模糊集質性比較分析 (fsQCA) 與迴歸分析方法，以檢視多重條件如何共同形塑對數位轉型的關注。我們發現，規範壓力、財政能力、經濟條件和數位基礎設施為高政策關注度奠定了基礎。在此基礎之上，我們識別出跨越這些維度的三種配置：「能力校準」（其中具有技術官僚背景和數位文化的領導者共同促進內生承諾）、「壓力遵循」（其中強制性、模仿性和規範性壓力共同驅動政策關注）以及「同儕學習調適」（其中當自上而下的指令較弱時，政府透過橫向模仿來提升關注度）。迴歸分析顯示，「壓力遵循」對數位政策關注度產生最強烈的影響。這些發現揭示了數位治理背後的配置動態。

papers.title: Empowering Employability for a Sustainable Future: How HR Practices Support Workers with Disabilities in the Public Sector in the Netherlands
papers.abstract: The Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) emphasize inclusive economic growth (SDG 8) and reduced inequalities (SDG 10), including equal employment opportunities for workers with disabilities (WWDs). Despite international and national efforts, WWDs still face barriers to labor market participation. Public sector organizations are expected to lead in inclusive HRM but often lag behind in employing WWDs, raising concerns about their ability to contribute to the SDGs. Using Social Exchange Theory and Self Determination Theory, we examine how three HR practices of training and development, workplace accommodations, and establishing clear expectations affect the employability of 313 WWDs in a Dutch public sector organization. Survey data were analyzed using confirmatory factor analysis and regression-based mediation analysis. Findings show that HR practices primarily impact employability mediated through basic psychological needs satisfaction, with limited direct effects. This study offers empirical insights on how inclusive HRM in the public sector can advance the SDGs.
papers.abstract_zh: 永續發展目標 (SDGs) 強調具包容性的經濟成長 (SDG 8) 和減少不平等 (SDG 10)，其中包括為身心障礙者 (WWDs) 提供平等就業機會。儘管國際和國內持續努力，身心障礙者在勞動市場參與方面仍面臨障礙。公部門組織被期望能引領具包容性的人力資源管理，但在僱用身心障礙者方面卻常落後，這引發了對其能否有效貢獻永續發展目標的擔憂。本研究運用社會交換理論和自我決定理論，探討訓練與發展、工作場所調整以及建立明確期望這三種人力資源實務，如何影響一家荷蘭公部門組織中313位身心障礙者的就業能力。問卷資料採用驗證性因素分析和迴歸基礎的中介分析進行處理。研究結果顯示，人力資源實務主要透過基本心理需求滿足來中介影響就業能力，而直接效果則有限。本研究為公部門中具包容性的人力資源管理如何推進永續發展目標，提供了實證見解。

papers.title: The promise and performance of social impact bonds
papers.abstract: This article examines social impact bonds (SIBs), first scrutinizing early discourse on their promises—increased accountability through competitive public-private partnerships, outcomes measurement, and a learning approach to performance management—drawing on theories of New Public Management and New Public Governance. Then, a structured review of empirical research is used to evaluate SIB performance against their public management reform promises. Findings show that while SIBs sometimes foster intersectoral collaboration, they can also surface power imbalances, institutionalize gaming, and inadvertently reduce public accountability. A faltering commitment to robust outcomes measurement is also demonstrated, with negative implications for effective governance and public value.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文檢視社會影響債券 (SIBs)，首先審視其早期論述所提出的承諾——透過競爭性公私協力夥伴關係、成效衡量以及績效管理的學習取向來強化課責性——並援引新公共管理與新公共治理理論。接著，本文採用結構化的實證研究回顧，旨在評估SIBs的績效是否符合其公共管理改革的承諾。研究發現，SIBs雖然有時能促進跨部門協作，卻也可能揭示權力失衡、制度化鑽營行為，並可能無意間削弱公共課責性。此外，對嚴謹的成效衡量承諾亦顯動搖，對於有效治理與公共價值造成負面影響。

papers.title: The Hidden Costs of Red Tape: Exploring the Physical Toll of Red Tape on Teachers
papers.abstract: When rules impose compliance burdens that outweigh their contribution to teachers’ objectives or values, they are experienced as red tape . Given red tape’s negative consequences, it is concerning that teachers worldwide report being confronted with high levels of red tape in their jobs. Drawing on Job Demands-Resources theory and Affective Events Theory, this study investigates the relationship between teachers’ red tape perceptions and physical complaints (e.g., neck pain and headaches). Specifically, we explore the mediating role of work-related anger in this relationship and investigate whether servant leadership moderates the negative effects of red tape. We collected time-lagged data from 717 teachers in Flemish schools. Structural Equation Modeling revealed a positive relationship between red tape and physical complaints, mediated by work-related anger. Furthermore, the results indicate that when teachers perceive their school leader as a servant leader, work-related anger is less affected by red tape, which indirectly reduces their physical complaints.
papers.abstract_zh: 當規章制度所造成的遵循負擔，超過其對教師目標或價值的貢獻時，這些規章制度便被視為繁文縟節。鑑於繁文縟節的負面影響，全球教師普遍反映在工作中面臨高度的繁文縟節，此現象令人擔憂。本研究借鑒工作要求-資源理論（Job Demands-Resources theory）和情感事件理論（Affective Events Theory），探討教師對繁文縟節的感知與身體不適（例如：頸部疼痛和頭痛）之間的關係。具體而言，我們探討工作相關憤怒在此關係中的中介作用，並研究僕人式領導（servant leadership）是否能調節繁文縟節的負面影響。我們收集了來自法蘭德斯地區學校717位教師的跨時間點資料。結構方程模型（Structural Equation Modeling, SEM）分析結果顯示，繁文縟節與身體不適之間存在正向關係，且此關係由工作相關憤怒所中介。此外，結果指出，當教師將其學校領導者視為僕人式領導者時，工作相關憤怒較不受繁文縟節的影響，進而間接減少其身體不適。

papers.title: “You Keep Using That Word. I do not Think it Means What you Think it Means”: Interjurisdictional Equity in Local Option Tax Policy
papers.abstract: Fairness in tax policy is a widely shared goal among scholars, policymakers, and the public, yet equity remains a contested concept. This study examines interjurisdictional equity in the context of local option taxes (LOTs), which have become an increasingly significant revenue source for local governments. While much of the existing research on LOTs focuses on competition, rate setting, and adoption, this paper considers how different dimensions of equity intersect in shaping their implementation and effects and presents an analytical framework that can be applied to understanding interjurisdictional equity more holistically. Using a North Carolina local sales tax revenue policy designed to distribute revenues more equitably, this study analyzes county-level data from 2013 to 2019 to assess the policy's impact across multiple equity measures. The findings highlight complementary and conflicting equity considerations, underscoring the need for policymakers to clearly define their equity objectives to achieve desired policy outcomes. This research contributes to a more nuanced understanding of fairness in local public finance.
papers.journal: The American Review of Public Administration
papers.abstract_zh: 租稅政策的公平性是學者、政策制定者和公眾之間普遍認同的目標，然而，衡平性仍是一個備受爭議的概念。本研究探討在地方選擇性稅收（LOTs）的背景下的跨轄區衡平性，此類稅收已成為地方政府日益重要的財政收入來源。儘管現有關於地方選擇性稅收的研究多著重於競爭、稅率設定和採行，本文則探討衡平性的不同面向如何交織影響其執行與成效，並提出一個分析框架，可用於更全面地理解跨轄區衡平性。本研究以北卡羅來納州一項旨在更公平分配稅收的地方銷售稅政策為例，分析2013年至2019年的縣級數據，以評估該政策在多個衡平性指標上的影響。研究結果突顯了互補與衝突的衡平性考量，強調政策制定者需明確界定其衡平性目標，以實現預期的政策成效。本研究有助於在地方公共財政領域中，更細緻地理解公平性。

papers.title: Public value as care within and for practices
papers.abstract: This article draws on practice theory and care theory to conceptualize public value as care within and for the practices to which citizens are entitled. In doing so, it contributes by theoretically integrating major strands of public value research. More specifically, it shows that strategic management of public value depends on the sustained care for practices; that contestation over public value centres on struggles over what should be cared for; that the cocreation and codestruction of public value depend on the extent to which practices are carefully sustained; and that public values are normatively grounded in care and become visible through enacted practices. The article also outlines practical implications for addressing pressing collective challenges through policy design and demonstrates how legitimacy, management, and accountability are reconfigured when public value is understood as care within and for the practices to which citizens are entitled.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文立基於實踐理論與關懷理論，將公共價值概念化為在公民應享有的實踐中，並為其所做的關懷。藉此，本文的貢獻在於從理論上整合了公共價值研究的各個主要流派。更具體地說，本文指出：公共價值的策略性管理取決於對實踐的持續關懷；對公共價值的爭議核心在於對「應關懷什麼」的爭奪；公共價值的共創與共毀仰賴於實踐被審慎維護的程度；以及公共價值在規範上根植於關懷，並透過實踐行動而顯現。本文也概述了透過政策設計來應對緊迫集體挑戰的實務意涵，並闡明了當公共價值被理解為在公民應享有的實踐中，並為其所做的關懷時，正當性、管理與問責將如何被重新配置。

papers.title: Conceptualizing and Measuring the Rule of Law in Public Administration—Regulations, Organization, and Decision-Making
papers.abstract: The rule of law is foundational to Public Administration (PA), yet the field has long lacked a clear conceptualization of what the rule of law entails and, furthermore, an objective measurement system. Grounded in the “thin” conception of the rule of law and integrated within the public administration context, we propose a three-dimensional framework: Regulations, Organization, and Decision-making. We operationalize this framework as the Public Administration Rule of Law Index (PARLI), a composite measure built from three level-1 and seven level-2 indicators, using objective data to ensure replicability. We apply this index to measure the rule of law in China's 31 provinces (2020–2024) and validate it by examining its relationship with key socioeconomic outcomes. The results align with theoretical expectations: PARLI scores are positively correlated with entrepreneurship and innovation but negatively correlated with government responsiveness. These findings simultaneously confirm the measure's validity and reveal the inherent tensions in applying the rule of law within the public administration. This study makes two primary contributions. First, it provides scholars with a coherent framework to overcome knowledge fragmentation and cumulate scientific inquiry. Second, it offers a replicable and objective measurement toolkit for policy analysis.
papers.journal: The American Review of Public Administration
papers.abstract_zh: 法治是公共行政 (PA) 的基礎，然而，該領域長期以來缺乏對法治意涵的清晰概念化，此外，也缺乏客觀的衡量系統。本研究立基於「薄」法治概念，並整合於公共行政脈絡中，提出一個三維框架：規章、組織與決策。我們將此框架操作化為公共行政法治指數 (PARLI)，這是一個由三個第一層級與七個第二層級指標建構而成的綜合性衡量指標，並採用客觀數據以確保其可複製性。我們將此指數應用於衡量中國 31 個省份的法治狀況 (2020-2024年)，並透過檢視其與關鍵社會經濟成果的關係來驗證其有效性。研究結果符合理論預期：PARLI 分數與創業和創新呈正相關，但與政府回應性呈負相關。這些發現同時證實了該衡量指標的有效性，並揭示了在公共行政中應用法治時所固有的張力。本研究有兩項主要貢獻。首先，它為學者提供一個連貫的框架，以克服知識碎片化並累積科學探究。其次，它提供一個可複製且客觀的衡量工具包，供政策分析使用。

papers.title: Navigating challenges at the frontline: evidence from Youth Outreach Unit (YOU) in marginalized communities
papers.abstract: Police-led youth programs provide mentorship and support for youth in marginalized communities, yet limited research examines their implementation challenges and adaptive strategies. This qualitative study investigates the Youth Outreach Unit (YOU) in Miami-Dade County, Florida, using virtual semi-structured interviews with program leaders and officers. Findings identify three key implementation challenges: resource constraints, understaffing and limited expertise, and unclear goals and performance metrics. We further identify three pathways for improvement: formal partnerships and community collaboration, strategic use of goal ambiguity, and clearer metrics, protocols, and accountability mechanisms. The study offers policy implications for designing and supporting community-based youth programs.
papers.abstract_zh: 警方主導的青少年計畫為邊緣化社區的青少年提供指導與支持，然而，鮮少有研究探討其實施挑戰與調適策略。本質性研究旨在調查佛羅里達州邁阿密-戴德縣的青少年外展單位 (YOU)，透過與計畫領導者和警員進行虛擬半結構式訪談。研究結果指出三項主要的實施挑戰：資源限制、人力不足與專業知識有限，以及目標不明確與績效指標不清。我們進一步提出三項改進途徑：正式夥伴關係與社區合作、策略性地運用目標模糊性，以及更明確的指標、規範與課責機制。本研究為設計與支持以社區為基礎的青少年計畫提供政策意涵。
